# Chapter 2: Linear control: transfer functions, Bode, Nyquist  (~120 pp)
- 2.1 Plant, controller, feedback (10) · 2.2 Transfer functions (15) · 2.3 Stability: poles, root locus (15) · 2.4 Bode plots (15) · 2.5 Nyquist criterion (15) · 2.6 PID design and tuning (18) · 2.7 Lead-lag compensators (15) · 2.8 Failure section: gain margin and phase margin too low; resonance amplification (17)

**Archetype**: control, stability. **Project**: tune a real PID for a physical plant (motor, thermal, level). **Exercises**: 40.
